ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, plugin would try to apply your embed URL as audio for the vault's ambience.
ast.target: 启用后，插件将尝试将您的嵌入URL用作保险库的环境音。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Be aware, that some videos on YouTube are blocked to be played as embed, so they may be not working in the Obsidian's Vault.
ast.target: 请注意，YouTube上的某些视频被阻止作为嵌入播放，因此它们可能无法在Obsidian保险库中工作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, plugin would try to apply your embed URL as audio for the files's ambience specifically: meaning one file got one ambience and etc., prioritised over vault's ambience (vault ambience would stop playing).
ast.target: 启用后，插件将尝试将您的嵌入URL专门用作文件的环境音：即一个文件对应一个环境音，以此类推，优先级高于保险库环境音（保险库环境音将停止播放）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: To apply custom ambience to file, insert into the metadata cache of the file (YAML) "music" variable with URL or path to your audio.
ast.target: 要将自定义环境音应用于文件，请在文件的元数据缓存（YAML）中插入“music”变量，其值为音频的URL或路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control volume of YouTube/Local audios. Audio from SoundCloud doesn't support this feature.
ast.target: 控制YouTube/本地音频的音量。来自SoundCloud的音频不支持此功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allows you to view frames generated by this plugin, meaning you can view mini-players for music/video.
ast.target: 允许您查看此插件生成的帧，这意味着您可以查看音乐/视频的迷你播放器。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Path/URL to the audio of Vault's ambience (supports YouTube, SoundCloud):
ast.target: 保险库环境音的音频路径/URL（支持YouTube、SoundCloud）：
